scripts.clean: find . -name node_modules -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -f bun.lock bun.lockb && bun install --force
scripts.release:please: gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f channel=stable
scripts.release:alpha: gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f channel=alpha -f bump=patch -f source_ref=main -f dry_run=false
scripts.release:alpha:dry-run: gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f channel=alpha -f bump=patch -f source_ref=main -f dry_run=true
scripts.release:beta: gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f channel=beta -f bump=patch -f source_ref=main -f dry_run=false
scripts.release:beta:dry-run: gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f channel=beta -f bump=patch -f source_ref=main -f dry_run=true
scripts.release:rc: gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f channel=rc -f bump=patch -f source_ref=main -f dry_run=false
scripts.release:rc:dry-run: gh workflow run release.yml --ref main -f channel=rc -f bump=patch -f source_ref=main -f dry_run=true
